questions: How should brands manage centralized vs. local marketing?
qa.answer: Franchise systems require consistent brand governance with localized activation. Central teams set strategy, assets, and guardrails; local operators execute channel‑specific tactics tailored to their markets.
implication: Create brand templates, asset libraries, and approval workflows.
Enable localized targeting and offers within compliance guardrails.
Consolidate measurement with roll‑up dashboards by location/region.
